summary: Admin Service Toggles feature testing completed. All 8 services (Mobile Recharge, DTH Recharge, EMI, Gift Cards, Redeem to Bank, etc.) can be toggled. Error message 'Service temporarily down. Please try again later.' correctly blocks disabled services.

minor.issue: Intermittent 520 Cloudflare errors when accessing via external URL - works fine via localhost

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/service-toggles returns all 8 services with correct names and status
✅ Backend: POST /api/admin/service-toggles/{service_key} toggles services and logs activity
✅ Backend: Bill payment, Gift Voucher, Bank Redeem endpoints check service status before processing
✅ Backend: Error message is in English: 'Service temporarily down. Please try again later.'
✅ Frontend: AdminServiceToggles.js renders all 8 services with toggle switches
✅ Frontend: Toast notification shows on toggle success
✅ Frontend: AdminSettingsHub.js includes 'Service On/Off' card linking to /admin/service-toggles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Service Toggles feature tested in iteration 70. All 8 services toggleable via /admin/service-toggles page. Backend APIs working: GET /api/admin/service-toggles (returns 8 services), POST /api/admin/service-toggles/{key} (toggles service). Service blocking verified: When service is disabled, requests return HTTP 503 with message 'Service temporarily down. Please try again later.' Settings Hub has 'Service On/Off' link.
rca_of_the_issue: Feature implementation complete - no issues found.
